hotkey_conflict.title: Hotkey conflict
hotkey_conflict.description_one: The shortcut below couldn't be registered — it may be claimed by the system or another app. Bind a new combo right here.
hotkey_conflict.description_other: {{count}} shortcuts couldn't be registered — they may be claimed by the system or another app. Bind new combos right here.

login.title: Sign in to OpenLoaf
login.openloaf_note: OpenSpeech is an OpenLoaf product — one OpenLoaf account works across the family.
login.description: Choose a sign-in method to continue

subtitle.idle: Choose how you'd like to sign in
subtitle.polling: Waiting for you to finish in the browser

login.byo_hint: Don't want to sign in to OpenLoaf? Point OpenSpeech at your own STT REST endpoint and audio stays local — never routed through our cloud.

account.title: Account
account.subscribe_hint: Manage your subscription and plan on the OpenLoaf website.
account.recharge_hint: 1 CNY = 100 credits. You can top up without subscribing to a plan.
account.logout_hint: Signing out clears your local sign-in state. Local recordings, history and dictionary are kept.

close_to_bg.title: Close to background
close_to_bg.description: OpenSpeech is about to close the main window. The app will keep running in the background.
close_to_bg.body_1_prefix: OpenSpeech will keep running in the
close_to_bg.body_2: Reopen the main window from the tray icon, or choose "Quit" to fully exit.

no_internet.title: No internet connection
no_internet.description: Your computer is offline. Check your network and try again.
no_internet.body: Your computer isn't connected to the internet. Check your network and try again.

hotkey_preview.default_hint: Tap to start · tap again to stop
